search_document:
User Request: Orders by shipper.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Orders by Shipper
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of orders by shipping company
Title: Top Shippers
Type: table
Description: Shippers with the highest number of orders
Title: Total Freight Charges
Type: kpi
Description: Overall freight charges incurred

sql_queries.title: Orders by Shipper
sql_queries.description: Distribution of orders by shipping company
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders o JOIN Shippers s ON o.ShipVia = s.ShipperID GROUP BY s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Top Shippers
sql_queries.description: Shippers with the highest number of orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders o JOIN Shippers s ON o.ShipVia = s.ShipperID GROUP BY s.CompanyName ORDER BY OrderCount DESC LIMIT 5

sql_queries.title: Total Freight Charges
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreightCharges FROM Orders
